parameters.query: SELECT tp.id AS tracked_page_id, tp.url, tp.url_type AS page_type, tp.company_id, c.name AS company_name FROM core.tracked_pages tp JOIN core.companies c ON tp.company_id = c.id JOIN icp_drift.surface_config sc ON sc.company_id = tp.company_id AND sc.surface = tp.url_type AND sc.enabled = true WHERE tp.enabled = true AND tp.url_type IN ('careers','case_studies','pricing','integrations');

INSERT INTO icp_drift.snapshots (company_id, tracked_page_id, page_type, snapshot_hash, normalized_text) VALUES ({{ '\'' + $('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.company_id + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.tracked_page_id + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.page_type + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $json.data + '\'' }}, {{ '$n8n$' + ($('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.normalized_text || '') + '$n8n$' }}) ON CONFLICT (tracked_page_id, snapshot_hash) DO UPDATE SET fetched_at = now() RETURNING id AS snapshot_id;

SELECT id AS prev_snapshot_id, normalized_text AS prev_text FROM icp_drift.snapshots WHERE tracked_page_id = {{ '\'' + $('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.tracked_page_id + '\'' }} ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;

INSERT INTO icp_drift.indicators (company_id, snapshot_id, page_type, buyer_titles, org_size_language, seniority_signals, functional_emphasis, integration_mix) VALUES ({{ '\'' + $('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.company_id + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $('Upsert Snapshot').item.json.snapshot_id + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $('Normalize Content (LLM)').item.json.page_type + '\'' }}, {{ '$n8n$' + JSON.stringify($json.buyer_signals || []) + '$n8n$' }}::jsonb, {{ '$n8n$' + JSON.stringify($json.segment_signals || []) + '$n8n$' }}::jsonb, {{ '$n8n$' + JSON.stringify($json.buyer_signals || []) + '$n8n$' }}::jsonb, {{ '$n8n$' + JSON.stringify([$json.inferred_buyer, $json.inferred_buyer_type].filter(Boolean)) + '$n8n$' }}::jsonb, {{ '$n8n$' + JSON.stringify($json.vertical_signals || []) + '$n8n$' }}::jsonb) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO icp_drift.drift_events (company_id, tracked_page_id, page_type, prev_snapshot_id, snapshot_id, changed, drift_directions, evidence_sources, confidence, summary) VALUES ({{ '\'' + $json.company_id + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $json.tracked_page_id + '\'' }}, {{ '\'' + $json.page_type + '\'' }}, {{ $json.prev_snapshot_id ? '\'' + $json.prev_snapshot_id + '\'' : 'NULL' }}, {{ '\'' + ($json.snapshot_id || '') + '\'' }}, {{ $json.has_drift || false }}, {{ '\'{' + ($json.drift_direction ? '"' + $json.drift_direction + '"' : '') + '}\'' }}, '{}', 'low', $n8n${{ ($json.drift_summary || '') }}$n8n$) RETURNING id AS drift_event_id;

INSERT INTO control_plane.signals (signal_type, severity, title, summary, source_schema, source_table, source_id) VALUES ('icp', {{ $json.severity || 2 }}, 'ICP drift detected', 'ICP drift detected on tracked page', 'icp_drift', 'drift_events', {{ '\'' + ($json.drift_event_id || '') + '\'' }}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
